TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Don_Boven, title = Don_Boven, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Don_Boven} }

S.FORM: Don Boven kawas tay 1925, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 3, Don Boven, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2011) qyanux na sraral ru qyanux na hetay Don Boven htagan beh sa misinkngco kalomacu .hiya ga te sazing mlikuy. hiya yaba yaya kinhulan beh klonikng. Don Boven mqwas beh lingkng gocyu. 1943 kawas tmasot hopa pqwasan biru. nisan hopa pqwasan biru lga Don Boven sakang' te sasing cinbwanan mciriq maki Amerika hetay. krahu' pqwasan biru na qnxan 1946-1949 kawas, Boven mqwas beh Western Michigan krach' pqwasan biru.masoq qutux kawas Boven magal blaq balay wagiq sqabu maki Western krahu' pqwasan.biru. maki Sipu krahu' pqwasan biru.Boven maki mslokah hi blaq balay,mari kalam mari tkura ru tmuing mari magal mpuw qutux 封 校訓信. maki masoq qutux kawas na Sipu krahu' pqwasan biru ,wal magal mslokah wagiq sqabu. maki Michigan mzyu mari, Boven 1946-1949 kawas, magal 1099 分 pincyogan na qnxan. cyugal krahu' pqwasan biru, Boven tmwang te sazing maki kwara Amerika.1949 kawas, 大 payat lga,tmwang te qutux maki kwara Amerika. masoq krahu' pqwasan biru lga, Boven agal Detroit Lions , Chicago Cubs ru lahuy na tkura mari mlawa'. hiya tkura mari ru 1949 kawas BAA te tzyu' 選秀 nyux saku ginnoyaw na Intianpolis Awlipik' . pincyogan na qnxan kumi na Hwatieru kwali(1949-1951 kawas) 1949 kawas,Boven t'aring kumi na Hwatieru kwali klokah.maki krahu' pqwasan biru ru pspung zikang,qnxan na pincyogan ga cipoq 前鋒. lahuy mari' magal te magal 19-43 lalu nya maki Sipu pspung NBA. masoq pspung lga,qutux pspung loziy,kumi na Hwatieru kwali mshriq NBA,tmwang t'ring semong koka na mari' tkura pspung. kumi na Mi'woci kwali(1951-1953 kawas) trang kumi na Hwatieru kwali ru NPBL msqun takuy la, Boven ru kumi na Hwatieru kwali biru qutux pspung.mari' tkura qani,magal te magal lalu nya maki Sipu pspung. Boven te cyugal lalu nya. Baltimore Bullets ru Fort Wayne Pistons (1953) 1952-1953 kawas pspung ryax, Boven Baltimore Bullets yugun Fort Wayne Pistons . pcbaq ru qnxan Western Michigan krahu' pqwasan biru hiya masoq tkaru mari mhngaw lga, Boven t'aring cbaqan sato' na qnxan maki Western Michigan krahu' pqwasan biru . maki 1958-1959 kawas pspung ryax, Boven pcbaq sato' Bronco's lahuy. maki 1959-1960 kawas, Boven magal qutux pspung ryax(12-11).ru maki 1961-1962 kawas,trang mari tkura 13-11 magal. Boven pcbaq seto' maki Western Michigan ,1966 kawas,masoq qyanux na pcbaq magal 75–112 (.401). maki Western mtzyaw ga, Boven magal krahu' pqwasan biru la. 1975 kawas, Boven tmwang Western Michigan's,trang mslokah mrhuw na pqwasan biru :hiya maki qani pqwasan biru magal 尊重. hiya blaq balay qutux sinsiy. mhngaw la ru qyanux nya Boven mtzyaw mtzyul sazing kawas maki Western Michigan krahu' pqwasan biru.1985 kawas, maki Western Michigan krahu' pqwasan biru cyux mhngaw la. masoq qyanux na mari' tkura lga,1953 kawas 4 byacing 25 ryax, Boven ru Charlotte Kniese msqun la, maki cyugal laqi nya. hiya mpqbaq beh Western Michigan krahu' pqwasan biru.qutux ngasal htagan Mattawan Michigan. Boven mtzyaw mslokah na mari' tkura,2004 kawas lga,tmwang kumi na Hwatieru kwali pspung na s'aring msqun.hiya ga Amerika koka mari' tkura mhngaw squilq na p'unro. 2016 kawas 6 byacing, Charlotte Boven wal mhuqil la. 2011 kawas 3 byacing 10 ryax,Donald wal mhuqil la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Don Boven kawas tay 1925, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 3, Don Boven, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2011) qyanux na sraral ru qyanux na hetay Don Boven htagan beh sa misinkngco kalomacu .hiya ga te sazing mlikuy. hiya yaba yaya kinhulan beh klonikng. Don Boven mqwas beh lingkng gocyu. 1943 kawas tmasot hopa pqwasan biru. nisan hopa pqwasan biru lga Don Boven sakang' te sasing cinbwanan mciriq maki Amerika hetay. krahu' pqwasan biru na qnxan 1946-1949 kawas, Boven mqwas beh Western Michigan krach' pqwasan biru.masoq qutux kawas Boven magal blaq balay wagiq sqabu maki Western krahu' pqwasan.biru. maki Sipu krahu' pqwasan biru.Boven maki mslokah hi blaq balay,mari kalam mari tkura ru tmuing mari magal mpuw qutux 封 校訓信. maki masoq qutux kawas na Sipu krahu' pqwasan biru ,wal magal mslokah wagiq sqabu. maki Michigan mzyu mari, Boven 1946-1949 kawas, magal 1099 分 pincyogan na qnxan. cyugal krahu' pqwasan biru, Boven tmwang te sazing maki kwara Amerika.1949 kawas, 大 payat lga,tmwang te qutux maki kwara Amerika. masoq krahu' pqwasan biru lga, Boven agal Detroit Lions , Chicago Cubs ru lahuy na tkura mari mlawa'. hiya tkura mari ru 1949 kawas BAA te tzyu' 選秀 nyux saku ginnoyaw na Intianpolis Awlipik' . pincyogan na qnxan kumi na Hwatieru kwali(1949-1951 kawas) 1949 kawas,Boven t'aring kumi na Hwatieru kwali klokah.maki krahu' pqwasan biru ru pspung zikang,qnxan na pincyogan ga cipoq 前鋒. lahuy mari' magal te magal 19-43 lalu nya maki Sipu pspung NBA. masoq pspung lga,qutux pspung loziy,kumi na Hwatieru kwali mshriq NBA,tmwang t'ring semong koka na mari' tkura pspung. kumi na Mi'woci kwali(1951-1953 kawas) trang kumi na Hwatieru kwali ru NPBL msqun takuy la, Boven ru kumi na Hwatieru kwali biru qutux pspung.mari' tkura qani,magal te magal lalu nya maki Sipu pspung. Boven te cyugal lalu nya. Baltimore Bullets ru Fort Wayne Pistons (1953) 1952-1953 kawas pspung ryax, Boven Baltimore Bullets yugun Fort Wayne Pistons . pcbaq ru qnxan Western Michigan krahu' pqwasan biru hiya masoq tkaru mari mhngaw lga, Boven t'aring cbaqan sato' na qnxan maki Western Michigan krahu' pqwasan biru . maki 1958-1959 kawas pspung ryax, Boven pcbaq sato' Bronco's lahuy. maki 1959-1960 kawas, Boven magal qutux pspung ryax(12-11).ru maki 1961-1962 kawas,trang mari tkura 13-11 magal. Boven pcbaq seto' maki Western Michigan ,1966 kawas,masoq qyanux na pcbaq magal 75–112 (.401). maki Western mtzyaw ga, Boven magal krahu' pqwasan biru la. 1975 kawas, Boven tmwang Western Michigan's,trang mslokah mrhuw na pqwasan biru :hiya maki qani pqwasan biru magal 尊重. hiya blaq balay qutux sinsiy. mhngaw la ru qyanux nya Boven mtzyaw mtzyul sazing kawas maki Western Michigan krahu' pqwasan biru.1985 kawas, maki Western Michigan krahu' pqwasan biru cyux mhngaw la. masoq qyanux na mari' tkura lga,1953 kawas 4 byacing 25 ryax, Boven ru Charlotte Kniese msqun la, maki cyugal laqi nya. hiya mpqbaq beh Western Michigan krahu' pqwasan biru.qutux ngasal htagan Mattawan Michigan. Boven mtzyaw mslokah na mari' tkura,2004 kawas lga,tmwang kumi na Hwatieru kwali pspung na s'aring msqun.hiya ga Amerika koka mari' tkura mhngaw squilq na p'unro. 2016 kawas 6 byacing, Charlotte Boven wal mhuqil la. 2011 kawas 3 byacing 10 ryax,Donald wal mhuqil la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *on βo*en kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *on βo*en, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) qjanux na s~ɕraral ru qjanux na ħetaj *on βo*en ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa mis~ɕinkŋʦ~ʨo kalomaʦ~ʨu .ħija ɣa te s~ɕaziŋ mlikuj. ħija jaβa jaja kinħulan βeħ klonikŋ. *on βo*en mqwas~ɕ βeħ liŋkŋ ɣoʦ~ʨju. **** kawas~ɕ tmas~ɕot ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. nis~ɕan ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru lɣa *on βo*en s~ɕakaŋʔ te s~ɕas~ɕiŋ ʦ~ʨinβwanan mʦ~ʨiriq maki amerika ħetaj. kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru na qnxan ****-**** kawas~ɕ, βo*en mqwas~ɕ βeħ wes~ɕtern miʦ~ʨħiɣan kraʦ~ʨħʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.mas~ɕoq qutux kawas~ɕ βo*en maɣal βlaq βalaj waɣiq s~ɕqaβu maki wes~ɕtern kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan.βiru. maki s~ɕipu kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.βo*en maki ms~ɕlokaħ ħi βlaq βalaj,mari kalam mari tkura ru tmuiŋ mari maɣal mpuw qutux * ***. maki mas~ɕoq qutux kawas~ɕ na s~ɕipu kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru ,wal maɣal ms~ɕlokaħ waɣiq s~ɕqaβu. maki miʦ~ʨħiɣan mzju mari, βo*en ****-**** kawas~ɕ, maɣal **** * pinʦ~ʨjoɣan na qnxan. ʦ~ʨjuɣal kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru, βo*en tmwaŋ te s~ɕaziŋ maki kwara amerika.**** kawas~ɕ, * pajat lɣa,tmwaŋ te qutux maki kwara amerika. mas~ɕoq kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru lɣa, βo*en aɣal *etroit lions~ɕ , ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo ʦ~ʨuβs~ɕ ru laħuj na tkura mari mlawaʔ. ħija tkura mari ru **** kawas~ɕ βaa te tzjuʔ ** njux s~ɕaku ɣinnojaw na intianpolis~ɕ awlipikʔ . pinʦ~ʨjoɣan na qnxan kumi na ħwatieru kwali(****-**** kawas~ɕ) **** kawas~ɕ,βo*en tʔariŋ kumi na ħwatieru kwali klokaħ.maki kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru ru ps~ɕpuŋ zikaŋ,qnxan na pinʦ~ʨjoɣan ɣa ʦ~ʨipoq **. laħuj mariʔ maɣal te maɣal **-** lalu nja maki s~ɕipu ps~ɕpuŋ nβa. mas~ɕoq ps~ɕpuŋ lɣa,qutux ps~ɕpuŋ lozij,kumi na ħwatieru kwali ms~ɕħriq nβa,tmwaŋ tʔriŋ s~ɕemoŋ koka na mariʔ tkura ps~ɕpuŋ. kumi na miʔwoʦ~ʨi kwali(****-**** kawas~ɕ) traŋ kumi na ħwatieru kwali ru npβl ms~ɕqun takuj la, βo*en ru kumi na ħwatieru kwali βiru qutux ps~ɕpuŋ.mariʔ tkura qani,maɣal te maɣal lalu nja maki s~ɕipu ps~ɕpuŋ. βo*en te ʦ~ʨjuɣal lalu nja. βaltimore βullets~ɕ ru *ort wajne pis~ɕtons~ɕ (****) ****-**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ rjax, βo*en βaltimore βullets~ɕ juɣun *ort wajne pis~ɕtons~ɕ . pʦ~ʨβaq ru qnxan wes~ɕtern miʦ~ʨħiɣan kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru ħija mas~ɕoq tkaru mari mħŋaw lɣa, βo*en tʔariŋ ʦ~ʨβaqan s~ɕatoʔ na qnxan maki wes~ɕtern miʦ~ʨħiɣan kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru . maki ****-**** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ rjax, βo*en pʦ~ʨβaq s~ɕatoʔ βronʦ~ʨoʔs~ɕ laħuj. maki ****-**** kawas~ɕ, βo*en maɣal qutux ps~ɕpuŋ rjax(**-**).ru maki ****-**** kawas~ɕ,traŋ mari tkura **-** maɣal. βo*en pʦ~ʨβaq s~ɕetoʔ maki wes~ɕtern miʦ~ʨħiɣan ,**** kawas~ɕ,mas~ɕoq qjanux na pʦ~ʨβaq maɣal ****** (.***). maki wes~ɕtern mtzjaw ɣa, βo*en maɣal kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru la. **** kawas~ɕ, βo*en tmwaŋ wes~ɕtern miʦ~ʨħiɣanʔs~ɕ,traŋ ms~ɕlokaħ mrħuw na pqwas~ɕan βiru :ħija maki qani pqwas~ɕan βiru maɣal **. ħija βlaq βalaj qutux s~ɕins~ɕij. mħŋaw la ru qjanux nja βo*en mtzjaw mtzjul s~ɕaziŋ kawas~ɕ maki wes~ɕtern miʦ~ʨħiɣan kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.**** kawas~ɕ, maki wes~ɕtern miʦ~ʨħiɣan kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru ʦ~ʨjux mħŋaw la. mas~ɕoq qjanux na mariʔ tkura lɣa,**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax, βo*en ru ʦ~ʨħarlotte knies~ɕe ms~ɕqun la, maki ʦ~ʨjuɣal laqi nja. ħija mpqβaq βeħ wes~ɕtern miʦ~ʨħiɣan kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.qutux ŋas~ɕal ħtaɣan mattawan miʦ~ʨħiɣan. βo*en mtzjaw ms~ɕlokaħ na mariʔ tkura,**** kawas~ɕ lɣa,tmwaŋ kumi na ħwatieru kwali ps~ɕpuŋ na s~ɕʔariŋ ms~ɕqun.ħija ɣa amerika koka mariʔ tkura mħŋaw s~ɕquilq na pʔunro. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ, ʦ~ʨħarlotte βo*en wal mħuqil la. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,*onal* wal mħuqil la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
